name: causalops
description: Causal-inference tools for OpenMetadata. Rank upstream causes of failures, simulate blast radius of proposed changes, fetch risk scores, list recent failures.

API_BASE_URL.description: Base URL of the CausalOps API (Fastify)

API_TOKEN.description: Bearer token for the CausalOps API (optional in dev)

MCP_HTTP_PORT.description: Port for the SSE transport when MCP_TRANSPORT=http
